agent.runner_summary: The simulator builds the existing OpenAI Agents SDK agent with finance_agent.agent.build_agent() and runs each turn through Runner with a simulator-local SQLite session to preserve multi-turn state.

log_notes: User prompts appear as user_message events and assistant replies appear as agent_message events.
The app keeps conversation state in a SQLite session, so multi-turn simulator runs preserve context across turns.
The only tool is the hosted WebSearchTool, so there are no local mockable component targets for isolated tool execution.
learning_env_guidance: Use the default agent target for end-to-end finance question scenarios because the project does not expose local function tools or subagent boundaries.
Use FixedInput when the exact wording or short question sequence matters, and PersonaInput when tone, follow-up behavior, or persistence matters.
Use LLMJudgeEvaluator for answer quality, citation use, and finance-specific reasoning checks; use CodeEvaluator only for deterministic transcript or metadata assertions.
Treat web-search-dependent behavior as end-to-end agent behavior because the hosted search tool cannot be mocked or invoked as a local component target.
